title: Disable auto-commit during tests
description: Shared execution root for adding RepositoryStorage auto-commit suppression in tests, wiring test-session defaults, and validating that explicit auto-commit coverage still exercises real git behavior.
acceptance_criteria: RepositoryStorage exposes a class-level _auto_commit flag defaulting to True.
Both git commit helpers return before any subprocess work when _auto_commit is False.
tests/test_orchestrator.py disables auto-commit for the general orchestrator test module while keeping BeadAutoCommitTests able to exercise real commit behavior.
Validation covers unchanged production defaults and the test-only performance suppression path.
